event

Black Tusk Siege of Washington

The endgame invasion in which Black Tusk enters Washington, places the city under siege and reveals its campaign against SHD.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Strategic reversal

The siege begins when the opening campaign appears close to victory. Black Tusk's arrival reveals that the network failure and struggle over the antiviral belong to a broader national campaign. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Black Tusk enters Washington after Agents restore the network, rescue President Ellis and retake Capitol Hill from the True Sons. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The private military group places Washington under siege. [1]

  3. confirmed

    After confronting Black Tusk at Tidal Basin, Division Agents recover the antivirals taken during the campaign. [1]

Related records

  • Division Network Crisisfollows
  • Black Tuskinvolves

  • Lower Manhattan Biological Attackprecedes

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This event page covers the official 2020 recap and does not yet enumerate every invaded mission.
